title: U.S. plan to end war seeks removal of Iran’s enriched uranium, officials say
summary_full: The proposal offered sanctions relief to Iran in return for the removal of all its enriched uranium and other U.S. demands, officials said.
summary_public: The proposal offered sanctions relief to Iran in return for the removal of all its enriched uranium and other U.S. demands, officials said.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: removal of all its enriched uranium and other U.S. demands
